CN: 希冀
EN: Hope

CN: 队伍唯一：每走过一个新的格子，回复 <WeaponEffect_Num:[StateArg1]%> 已损失血量。使用应急灵知体后，所有唤醒体的暴击率和暴击伤害提高 100%。在星辰篇中，效果改为「使装备者的维度影像造物出现的可能性提高 100％」。
EN:
In "Faded Legacy" stages: Recover <WeaponEffect_Num:[StateArg1]%> of missing HP whenever you move to an unexplored node.
Whenever you use Emergency Gnosis, all Awakeners gain +100% Crit. Rate & Crit. DMG until end of battle.

In "Astral Reign" stages: The wielder's Dimensional Image is twice as likely to appear.
